prestazioni: 3.6L Pentastar V6 (ERB engine code) forced induction via Garrett GT3582R turbocharger with 10.5psi boost, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by Banks Power, and a Motec M150 ECU reflash with ethanol flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Dana 44 front and rear axles with 4.88 gear ratios, Yukon Gear & Axle chromoly axle shafts, and a NV3550 to NV4500 transmission swap with a South Bend Clutch dual-disc setup for 500+ lb-ft torque capacity

Suspension overhaul with Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (2.5-inch diameter, 14-inch travel), TeraFlex JK/JL HD control arms with adjustable heim joints, and a Currie Enterprises Anti-Rock front sway bar for articulation retention under extreme off-road conditions
estetica: Rigid Industries SR-Series 50-inch LED light bar mounted on a custom Poison Spyder Brawler front bumper with integrated winch plate for a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch
AEV ProCal Snorkel with custom carbon fiber intake ducting, paired with a Mopar Performance cold-air intake system and a custom heat-shielded turbo inlet pipe wrapped in DEI Titanium exhaust wrap

Body-wide JL Wrangler-specific Rocket Bunny RB-W01 widebody kit with custom-fabricated aluminum fender flares, painted in PPG H8345 Mojave Sand with a matte clear coat, and paired with Method MR701 Beadlock wheels (17x9, +12mm offset) wrapped in 37x12.50R17 Nitto Trail Grappler tires
